subject: refactor(styling): replace UnoCSS with Tailwind CSS v4
body:
Swap UnoCSS (preset-uno + preset-icons) for Tailwind CSS v4 via
@tailwindcss/vite plugin. Replace icon CSS classes (i-lucide-*) with
lucide-vue-next Vue components across all 20 affected files.

- Remove unocss, @unocss/preset-uno, @unocss/preset-icons, @unocss/reset,
  @iconify-json/lucide
- Add tailwindcss, @tailwindcss/vite, lucide-vue-next
- Create src/index.css with @theme (brand colors) and @layer components
  (btn, card, input-field, page-title, section-title shortcuts)
- Update vite.config.ts: tailwindcss() replaces UnoCSS()
- Update main.ts: import './index.css' replaces virtual:uno.css
- Delete uno.config.ts
- Convert all i-lucide-* class-based icons to <Component /> JSX from
  lucide-vue-next (55 occurrences across 20 files)
- EmptyState.vue icon prop changed from string to Component type
- Dynamic icon arrays (TutorialModal, InstallInstructionsModal,
  WorkspaceDetailView, ToastNotification) use Component references
  with <component :is="..."> pattern

All utility classes (flex, p-4, rounded-lg, etc.) are compatible between
UnoCSS preset-uno and Tailwind — no class name changes needed.

Tags: styling, icons, tailwind, unocss, migration
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: vue-to-react-conversion
Semver: minor
